data.description: Pre-computes and caches assembled catalog views for performance optimization of the serving path
Transforms catalog data between model formats and converts between catalog and listing representations

external_deps.description: Temporal workflow orchestration platform
external_deps.label: temporal

data.description: Owns catalog cache generation and model conversion workflows; aligned to the catalog-to-listing data pipeline and serving cache population.
Provides controlled administrative operations: semantic validation, bulk entity management
Processes entity write operations from Kafka queues asynchronously
Authoritative create, read, update, delete, and scan operations for all catalog entities
Emits Kafka events whenever catalog entities are created, updated, or deleted
Provides blob/file storage for catalog assets such as images and backup artifacts
Builds and maintains search and catalog indexes to enable fast indexed reads
Manages dynamic configuration for Nexus services including schema registries and service config

external_deps.description: Schemaless document storage backed by relational database
external_deps.label: datastore

external_deps.description: Feature flag and dynamic configuration platform
external_deps.label: feature-flags

external_deps.description: Distributed blob and object storage system
external_deps.label: object-storage

external_deps.description: Temporal workflow orchestration platform
external_deps.label: temporal

data.description: Owns the authoritative catalog entity store (nexus-core) and its immediate platform support services. Acts as an internal platform providing Entity CRUD to all other Nexus teams and to external teams via x-as-a-service. Also owns async entity writing infrastructure.
Processes submitted feed payloads through validation, transformation, and entity writes in workflow engine
Accepts feed submissions from sellers and integration partners; provides job status and error visibility
Handles image ingestion, validation, transformation, and association with catalog entities
Ingests catalog data from the data warehouse via streaming message pipelines

external_deps.description: OAuth and identity service for authentication
external_deps.label: auth-service

external_deps.description: External store platform; also produces catalog update Kafka events
external_deps.label: external-store

external_deps.description: Feature flag and dynamic configuration platform
external_deps.label: feature-flags

external_deps.description: User identity and profile platform
external_deps.label: identity-gateway

external_deps.description: Key management service providing encryption keys
external_deps.label: kms

external_deps.description: Distributed blob and object storage system
external_deps.label: object-storage

external_deps.description: Marketplace pricing service
external_deps.label: pricing-service

external_deps.description: Store data platform providing seller and store information
external_deps.label: store-gateway

external_deps.description: Temporal workflow orchestration platform
external_deps.label: temporal

data.description: Owns the seller feed ingestion pipeline end-to-end: feed API, feed processing workers, media handling, and warehouse data ingestion. Aligned to the seller feed submission and data ingestion flow.
Monitors catalog metrics for statistical deviations and detects regressions before they impact users
Creates periodic backups of all catalog entities and supports restoring to a specific point in time
Stores, surfaces, and manages structured issues from feed validation failures and data quality checks
Minimal health status reporting for infrastructure readiness checks and service discovery

external_deps.description: Temporal workflow orchestration platform
external_deps.label: temporal

data.description: Owns statistical anomaly detection, real-time monitoring, issue tracking, backup/restore, and platform health status. Specializes in the deep statistics and reliability capabilities that underpin catalog quality guarantees.
Machine-readable debug interface exposing entity inspection and publishing simulation
Command-line tool for operators to inspect, debug, and perform maintenance tasks on catalog data
Owns operational tooling and developer-facing catalog interfaces. Primary focus: operational migration workflows, catalog tooling, and developer experience interfaces (MCP, CLI).
Performs automated cleanup, deduplication, and trimming of stale or corrupt catalog data
Builds assembled entity objects from flattened extension values for downstream consumption
Validates catalog entities against business rules and publishes them to the serving layer
Computes and applies extension attribute values to catalog entities before publication

external_deps.description: Feature flag and dynamic configuration platform
external_deps.label: feature-flags

external_deps.description: Temporal workflow orchestration platform
external_deps.label: temporal

data.description: Owns entity publishing, validation, and downstream enrichment services including entity construction, async writes, and data scrubbing. Aligned to the entity publishing and distribution flow.
Transforms catalog data between model formats and converts between catalog and listing representations
Provides fast, index-based access to catalog categories and items for search and browse

external_deps.description: Temporal workflow orchestration platform
external_deps.label: temporal

data.description: Nexus sub-team that owns quality frameworks, enrichers, validators, indexed query, catalog indexing, and data transformation pipeline. Provides specialized indexing and transformation capabilities to the Nexus platform.
Serves current catalog data to consumer-facing surfaces at high throughput
Continuously synchronizes entity changes from the authoritative store to the serving data layer

external_deps.description: Schemaless document storage backed by relational database
external_deps.label: datastore

external_deps.description: External store platform; also produces catalog update Kafka events
external_deps.label: external-store

data.description: Owns the shopper-facing serving layer: the CatalogServing API, the serving gateway, and the serving-ingestor that keeps serving data synchronized. Aligned to the consumer read path.
Ingests catalog images and content from social media platforms

external_deps.description: Temporal workflow orchestration platform
external_deps.label: temporal

data.description: External partner team that owns the social media content ingestion service (nexus-social-ingester). Deploys and operates a service within the Nexus platform boundary but is not part of the Nexus org.

service.description: Workflow worker running GenerateCatalogCache workflow; assembles and caches complete catalog views
service.label: nexus-cache-worker

service.description: Workflow worker executing model conversion workflows between catalog and listing data representations
service.label: nexus-conversion-worker

service.description: Administrative operations API for semantic validation, bulk entity management, and operator tasks
service.label: nexus-admin

service.description: Kafka consumer service that reads entity write messages and applies them asynchronously to the entity store
service.label: nexus-async-writer

service.description: On-premises blob storage service backed by datastore for catalog assets
service.label: nexus-blob

service.description: Authoritative entity CRUD API; main datastore-backed database interaction layer for all catalog entities
service.label: nexus-core

service.description: Catalog indexing API server that orchestrates the building of catalog search indexes
service.label: nexus-indexer

service.description: Workflow worker executing IndexPublishedItems and IndexCatalog workflows
service.label: nexus-indexer-worker

service.description: Configuration management service exposing ConfigService gRPC
service.label: nexus-registry

service.description: Workflow worker for ad-hoc and one-off feed processing jobs outside the standard scheduled pipeline
service.label: nexus-feed-adhoc-worker

service.description: RPC server for feed submission and job status tracking; exposes FeedAPIService (SubmitFeed, GetJob)
service.label: nexus-feed-api

service.description: Workflow worker executing feed processing workflows
service.label: nexus-feed-worker

service.description: Media processing API managing image lifecycle: ingestion, validation, transformation, and object storage
service.label: nexus-media

service.description: Warehouse data ingestion service combining a workflow worker and API server; processes streaming messages
service.label: nexus-warehouse-ingester

service.description: Anomaly detection service aggregating catalog stats, detecting deviations, producing to nexus.anomalies topic
service.label: nexus-anomaly-detector

service.description: Backup and restore service combining a gRPC API with workflow jobs: BackupCatalog, RestoreCatalog
service.label: nexus-backup

service.description: Issue management API exposing IssueStore gRPC (SyncIssues, ListProducerIssues)
service.label: nexus-issue-store

service.description: Real-time statistics service tracking per-catalog metrics and running workflow-based consistency checks
service.label: nexus-realtime-stats

service.description: Minimal health status reporting service providing gRPC health check endpoints
service.label: nexus-status

service.description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) server exposing debugging tools: readentity, getcatalogconfig, simulatepublishing
service.label: nexus-mcp

service.description: Multi-purpose operator CLI with subcommands: catalog, feed, product, media, backup, migration support
service.label: nexus-tool

service.description: Async operations coordination service providing EmulateConsumeDBEvent for decoupled entity processing
service.label: nexus-async

service.description: Product enrichment service hosting enricher functions that compute extension attribute values before publication
service.label: nexus-enricher

service.description: Entity construction API that assembles entity objects from flattened extension attribute values
service.label: nexus-entity-builder

service.description: Publishing and validation API server; runs entity validation pipelines and manages publishing lifecycle
service.label: nexus-publisher

service.description: Workflow worker for asynchronous publishing workflows and retry logic
service.label: nexus-publisher-worker

service.description: Data scrubbing service combining a workflow worker and API for cleanup, deduplication, and trimming
service.label: nexus-scrubber

service.description: Indexed catalog query API exposing CatalogQueryService gRPC (ScanCategory) for fast indexed browsing
service.label: nexus-query

service.description: Data transformation service running workflow jobs to convert entities between model formats; persists in relational DB
service.label: nexus-transformer

service.description: Read-optimized serving API exposing CatalogServing gRPC (GetItems, ScanCategory) for consumer-facing apps
service.label: nexus-serving

service.description: Gateway routing layer for serving endpoints
service.label: nexus-serving-gateway

service.description: Kafka consumer syncing entity change events to serving-layer datastore tables
service.label: nexus-serving-ingestor

service.description: Social media content ingestion service; workflow worker + API server running PrePublish workflow
service.label: nexus-social-ingester
